name: @granoflow/mcp-server
description: Connect MCP-capable AI agents to Granoflow workflows for local tasks, requirement capture, approval requests, due-task processing, reviews, first-run import, review cards, and work memory.

scripts.build: npm run clean && tsc -p tsconfig.json && chmod +x dist/index.js dist/gfmcp-runner-launcher.js
scripts.check:python: ruff check skills/granoflow-gfmcp-runner/scripts tests/python && ruff format --check skills/granoflow-gfmcp-runner/scripts tests/python && pyright skills/granoflow-gfmcp-runner/scripts tests/python && npm run test:python
scripts.check: npm run format && npm run lint && npm run check:python && npm run build && npm run test
